parameters.text: =🚨 CRITICAL FINANCIAL ALERT 🚨  The Finance Intelligence Platform has detected one or more critical financial anomalies requiring immediate attention.  Summary: {{$json.executive_summary}}  Highest Severity: {{$json.highestSeverity}} Total Anomalies: {{$json.anomalies.length}} Generated At: {{$json.generated_at}}  Please review the full report in Airtable and begin investigation immediately.

parameters.subject: 🚨 Critical Financial Alert - Immediate Action Required
parameters.html:
=

🚨 Critical Financial Alert

The Finance Intelligence Platform has detected one or more Critical financial anomalies requiring immediate attention.

Executive Summary

{{ $json.executive_summary }}

Report Details

  • Highest Severity: {{ $json.highestSeverity }}
  • Total Anomalies: {{ $json.anomalies.length }}
  • Generated At: {{ $json.generated_at }}

Detected Anomalies

{{ $json.anomalies.map(a => `

Severity: ${a.severity}

Title: ${a.title}

Description:
${a.description}

Evidence:
${a.evidence}

Recommendation:
${a.recommendation}

`).join('') }}

Please investigate these findings immediately.

Regards,
Finance Intelligence Platform
